topPlaces.name: Gumti Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Gumti Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in southern Tripura, India.

topPlaces.name: Clouded Leopard National Park
topPlaces.description: Clouded Leopard National Park is a national park in the Sepahijala Wildlife Sanctuary Tripura, India. It covers an area of about 5.08 square kilometres (1.96 sq mi) and is home to four species of primate monkey including Phayre's langur.

topPlaces.name: Gakulnagar
topPlaces.description: Gakulnagar is a census town in West Tripura district in the state of Tripura, India.

topPlaces.name: Bishramganj
topPlaces.description: Bishramganj is a small town and the headquarters of Sipahijala district in the Indian state of Tripura, situated about 35 km from the capital Agartala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sepahijala Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sepahijala Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sepahijala Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Maharaja Bir Bikram Airport, Agartala (26 km) and the nearest railway station is Agartala Railway Station (24 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sepahijala Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sepahijala Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sepahijala Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Sepahijala Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sepahijala Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gumti Wildlife Sanctuary, Clouded Leopard National Park, Gakulnagar, Bishramganj.
